$comment: Example generic output schema for crawled web pages. We store only the structured facts a site publishes about itself (JSON-LD / OpenGraph / meta), never the scraped page body — results link back to `url` for the full content. The scraper publishes extracted {name, fields} records under a schema like this; role inference (quickbeam/roles.py) discovers title/subtitle/tags automatically. Register with: node src/publish.mjs --schema fangorn.webpage.v1 --schema-def schemas/webpage.json --register-only. Extend the definition to match your extractor's output.

url.@description: Canonical URL of the page; the source link returned by search.

description.@description: Publisher-supplied summary (og:description / JSON-LD description), trimmed to summary length.
